'''fashala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leadlighting|leadlighting]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-sh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leadlighting|leadlighting]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fashala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæshælæth|fæshælæth]] || [[word:fæshælæj|fæshælæj]] || [[word:fæshælæsh|fæshælæsh]] || [[word:fæshælæ|fæshælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fashashalath|fashashalath]] || [[word:fashashalaj|fashashalaj]] || [[word:fashashalash|fashashalash]] || [[word:fashashala|fashashala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fashalath|fashalath]] || [[word:fashalaj|fashalaj]] || [[word:fashalash|fashalash]] || [[word:fashala|fashala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fashaflath|fashaflath]] || [[word:fashaflaj|fashaflaj]] || [[word:fashaflash|fashaflash]] || [[word:fashaflaf|fashaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fashalatha|fashalatha]] || [[word:fashalaja|fashalaja]] || [[word:fashalasha|fashalasha]] || [[word:fashalaka|fashalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fashalath|fashalath]] || [[word:fashalaj|fashalaj]] || [[word:fashalash|fashalash]] || [[word:fashala|fashala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fashalathal|fashalathal]] || [[word:fashalajal|fashalajal]] || [[word:fashalashal|fashalashal]] || [[word:fashalakal|fashalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fashalathatha|fashalathatha]] || [[word:fashalajaja|fashalajaja]] || [[word:fashalashasha|fashalashasha]] || [[word:fashalaka|fashalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fashalathan|fashalathan]] || [[word:fashalajan|fashalajan]] || [[word:fashalashan|fashalashan]] || [[word:fashalakan|fashalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fashalathaoro|fashalathaoro]] || [[word:fashalajaoro|fashalajaoro]] || [[word:fashalashaoro|fashalashaoro]] || [[word:fashalakaoro|fashalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
